kit_version: [fill in from VERSION at install time]

components.slug: [skill-slug, matching name: frontmatter in the installed SKILL.md]
components.installed_registry_version: [curated-skills-registry.md's vetting_date for this slug at install time; omit or null for source=user-authored]
components.installed_content_sha256: [64-char lowercase hex sha256 of the SKILL.md bytes AS installed]
components.last_synced_upstream_sha256: [64-char lowercase hex — pool hash at last sync; equals installed_content_sha256 at first install]
